/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fPIC -fopenmp -fPIC -g -fopenmp -msse -msse2 -msse3 -msse4 -msse4.1 -msse4.2  -fPIC -fopenmp -fPIC -g -O2 -fopenmp -fPIC -g -ggdb -shared -Wl,-soname,libmiao.core.so -o libmiao.core.so CMakeFiles/miao.core.dir/graph/graph.cc.o CMakeFiles/miao.core.dir/graph/optimizer.cc.o CMakeFiles/miao.core.dir/common/string_tools.cc.o CMakeFiles/miao.core.dir/math/marginal_covariance_cholesky.cc.o CMakeFiles/miao.core.dir/opti_algo/optimization_algorithm.cc.o CMakeFiles/miao.core.dir/opti_algo/opti_algo_gauss_newton.cc.o CMakeFiles/miao.core.dir/opti_algo/opti_algo_lm.cc.o CMakeFiles/miao.core.dir/opti_algo/opti_algo_dogleg.cc.o CMakeFiles/miao.core.dir/solver/solver.cc.o  -lglog -ltbb
